confirmed.title: CLI-TUI-002 (arqel:resource generator) listed as "Por chegar" but is shipped and registered
confirmed.evidence: cli/SKILL.md lines 140-144 place CLI-TUI-002 — the interactive Resource generator `php artisan arqel:resource` in arqel-dev/core — under a "### Por chegar" (coming soon) section. In reality it is fully implemented and registered: packages/core/src/Commands/MakeResourceCommand.php declares `protected $signature = 'arqel:resource ...'` (line 37) with the CLI-direct form `arqel:resource App\Models\Post --label=Post`, backed by packages/core/src/Generators/ResourceGenerator.php, and is registered in packages/core/src/ArqelServiceProvider.php line 53 (`MakeResourceCommand::class`). The feature is not "por chegar"; it ships.
confirmed.fix: Move the CLI-TUI-002 bullet out of the "### Por chegar" section (it is DELIVERED). If kept for cross-reference, reword to state the `arqel:resource` Artisan command already exists in arqel-dev/core (MakeResourceCommand + ResourceGenerator, registered in ArqelServiceProvider), rather than framing it as an upcoming item.

verdict.reason: CONFIRMED and NEW. packages/cli/SKILL.md lines 140-144 place CLI-TUI-002 — the `arqel:resource` Resource generator — under a "### Por chegar" (coming soon) section, describing it as an upcoming Artisan command that "reside em arqel-dev/core". In reality it is fully shipped: packages/core/src/Commands/MakeResourceCommand.php declares `protected $signature = 'arqel:resource ...'` (line 37), backed by Arqel\Core\Generators\ResourceGenerator, with both the CLI-direct form (docblock line 29: `arqel:resource App\Models\Post --label=Post`) AND the interactive CLI-TUI-002 wizard implemented (runInteractive at line 54). It is registered in packages/core/src/ArqelServiceProvider.php line 53 (`MakeResourceCommand::class`) inside hasCommands([...]). The doc therefore contradicts the code by labeling a delivered, registered feature as "por chegar". This is NOT covered by any SWEPT family: the only SWEPT cli/SKILL entry is `--starter 'react'` (a different item), and the "core README Artisan command lists" sweep applies to a different file (core README), not packages/cli/SKILL.md's "Por chegar" mis-classification of CLI-TUI-002. Proposed fix: move the CLI-TUI-002 bullet out of "### Por chegar" and reword it to state that `arqel:resource` (MakeResourceCommand + ResourceGenerator, registered in ArqelServiceProvider) already ships in arqel-dev/core, including the interactive wizard mode.

confirmed.title: CLI-TUI-004 doctor command listed as "Por chegar" but arqel:doctor is shipped and registered
confirmed.evidence: cli/SKILL.md lines 147-148 list CLI-TUI-004 — a Doctor command "(`arqel doctor`) verificando versões de PHP/Node/Composer" — under "### Por chegar". But packages/core/src/Console/DoctorCommand.php exists with `protected $signature = 'arqel:doctor {--json} {--strict}'` (line 45) and is registered in packages/core/src/ArqelServiceProvider.php line 55 (`DoctorCommand::class`). The doctor command that verifies PHP/Laravel/Composer versions is delivered, contradicting the "coming soon" status (the ledger already records arqel:doctor / checkAuthStarterKit() as delivered elsewhere).
confirmed.fix: Remove the CLI-TUI-004 bullet from "### Por chegar" and mark it DELIVERED, referencing packages/core/src/Console/DoctorCommand.php (`arqel:doctor`, registered in ArqelServiceProvider). Note the shipped name is the Artisan `arqel:doctor`, not the global-binary `arqel doctor` phrasing used in the stale bullet.

verdict.reason: Confirmed and NEW. packages/cli/SKILL.md lines 147-148 list CLI-TUI-004 — the Doctor command — under "### Por chegar" (coming soon). But the command is fully delivered: packages/core/src/Console/DoctorCommand.php defines `final class DoctorCommand` with `protected $signature = 'arqel:doctor {--json} {--strict}'` (line 45), its docblock states "Implements CLI-TUI-004" (line 32), and it is registered in packages/core/src/ArqelServiceProvider.php line 55 (`DoctorCommand::class`). It runs checkPhpVersion() and checkLaravelVersion(), so the "verifying PHP versions" premise holds. This is a genuine documented-status vs. code contradiction. It is NOT a duplicate: the three prior cli/SKILL.md ledger fixes were at lines 142, 126, and 26 (resource cmd name, README path, --starter default) and never touched the CLI-TUI-004 "Por chegar" bullet; the prior doctor-related fix (round 14) was in apps/docs/guide/authentication.md about starter-kit detection, a different file and claim. Minor caveat: the finding's evidence over-states scope by saying doctor checks "PHP/Node/Composer" — it does not check Node — but that does not undercut the core contradiction that the command is shipped while marked coming-soon. Fix: move CLI-TUI-004 out of "Por chegar" and mark it delivered as the Artisan `arqel:doctor` (not the global-binary `arqel doctor` phrasing).
